description: Conversational interface: AI asks questions one at a time, user responds. Letter builds in a live preview below the conversation.

css_layout_rules..chat-wizard: display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: calc(100vh - 64px); max-width: 760px; margin: 0 auto; width: 100%;
css_layout_rules..chat-messages: flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 2rem 1.5rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem;
css_layout_rules..letter-preview-accordion: border-top: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 1rem 1.5rem; flex-shrink: 0; max-height: 240px; overflow-y: auto;
css_layout_rules..chat-input-bar: padding: 1rem 1.5rem; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); display: flex; gap: 0.75rem; flex-shrink: 0;
